string.text:
An American-made sniper rifle, a modernized variant of the M14 adapted for the needs of special forces. Equipped with a heavy barrel and tactical attachments, providing high accuracy and stability when firing. Uses 7.62?51 mm NATO rounds, known for their excellent penetration capability. In various configurations, the rifle can be fitted with ACOG or SpecterDR scopes, offering comfortable aiming at medium and long ranges. It also supports the installation of a suppressor, making it ideal for stealth target elimination. Reliable and powerful, but requires careful maintenance—especially in the conditions of the Zone. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressors for 7.62?51 mm. 
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: most tactical scopes for a Picatinny rail.
